# Extensions.CoreResultTypeValues property

The core-protocol `resultType` discriminator values (spec §3.6). The accepted set for any interaction is these PLUS the values contributed by active extensions (R-24.5-e).

```csharp
public static IReadOnlyList<string> CoreResultTypeValues { get; }
```
